title: Over Door Hanger with 5 Hooks,Heavy Duty Hooks for Coat, Towel, Keys and Bag Storage (White), 11CM-WHITE-5HOOKS
features: 【Versatile and Convenient:】 The Mivitoom Over Door Hanger is perfect for organizing your coats, towels, keys, and bags. It fits most doors with its size of 12.7"(L) x 4.3"(W)/32.3*11cm, making it a great space-saving solution for any room.
【High-Quality:】 The 5 hooks are made of high-quality metal, ensuring durability and sturdiness. They can hold up to 50lbs, making it perfect for heavy coats and bags.
【Anti-Scratch Pads:】After installing the hanger, apply the reinforcing adhesive. Not only can it protect the door from scratches and damages, but opening and closing the door will not make noise.
【Easy to Install: 】 No drilling is required, just use the screws included - it's easy to assemble using a screwdriver (not included). Simply hang it on any door in your home.
【Stylish Design:】 The white color and sleek design of the hanger make it a stylish addition to any room, while keeping it organized and uncluttered.
description: Product Description High quality materials Made of stainless steel with a rust-resistant finish, these hooks are built to last and withstand daily use. Double hook design With double rows of hooks, you will have enough space to hang coats, hats, bags, clothes, towels, etc. Auxiliary stickers Not only can it protect the door from scratches and damages, but opening and closing the door will not make noise. Fit most standard doors Suitable for all standard doors from 3.9 cm to 4.5 cm (1.5‘ to 1.8’) thick with a jamb clearance greater than 1.5 mm (thickness of a coin). Holes aligned, screws tightened (screwdriver not supplied) Stick on the anti-slip pads Installation finished, hang it on the door and start to use it MIVITOOM Over Door Hanger with 5 Hooks, Door Hooks 32 cm (12.7") L and 11 cm ...
